title: Accountbeheer
desc: Neem vloot-accounts 'realtime' over en bekijk o.a. hun slimme winkelwagen

treatments.brief: A fleet-account list: rows MS Aldebaran / MS Castor / MS Pollux with the user (Kapt. naam) + an online status dot + a 'Neem over' action button per row.
An active takeover/impersonation session card: 'U bekijkt nu als MS Aldebaran' banner (navy, the signature) + a compact preview of that account's slimme winkelwagen + a quiet 'Stop sessie' control.
A preview of the taken-over account's smart cart: cart header + 3-4 line items with quantities and prices + a subtotal.
A rights/permissions matrix: accounts down the side, permissions (bestellen / goedkeuren / budget zien) across the top, with check/▢ cells.
An account-activity timeline: recent sessions/actions (ingelogd, winkelwagen bekeken, bestelling geplaatst) with timestamps.
